response.step_by_step_log: Observed the performers as FuwaMoco and Kurochan. Identified the song title as "KISS" through on-screen text and context. Lyrics were manually transcribed from the on-screen display throughout the video, as no direct online lyric source was found. English translations were provided based on the transcribed Japanese.
response.global_summary: A 3-minute performance segment featuring Kurochan and the VTuber duo FuwaMoco, followed by a lighthearted conversational segment with birthday celebration elements.

scenes.description: Performance of the song "KISS" by Kurochan featuring FuwaMoco. Choreography and dance are on display throughout.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
終わんないでドキドキへん愛予習
喉の奥がチクンチクン
僕はドクンドクン
心臓ごと引きずり出してみてよ
気持ちいいね面倒くさいけど
やっぱ照れくさいけど
死ぬまで忘れられないチューしよ
いかれた俺はゾンビで溢れる
君は僕に恋してる
ゾクゾク胸に繋がる動物をひきないよ
(Manual transcription)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Don't end it, prep for the heart-pounding forbidden love
My throat is tingling
I'm beating
Try dragging my whole heart out
It feels good, though it's a hassle
It's embarrassing, though
Let's have a kiss that we'll never forget until we die
Crazy me, overflowing with zombies
You're in love with me
I can't pull away from the animals connecting to my heart
(Manual transcription)

scenes.description: Conversation between Kurochan and FuwaMoco following the performance, including birthday wishes and playful interaction.
